reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 대박 ㅜㅠ 오자마자 츄르 까는 소리에 저 멀리서 달려오더니 냄새에 환장하고 허겁지겁 챱챱챱 먹는데 정말 깜놀 그자체!! 입맛까다롭고 입짧은 울애기가 넘 잘먹내요♡ 기존 저렴한 츄르만 먹이다가 이제 건강 츄르로 정착하고 싶어서 주문했는데 대만족 입니다 ㅜㅜ  성분표시도 맨앞에 연어 닭고기 로 되어있어서 안심되고 햇썹인증이라 더욱 안심되고 좋은것만 듬뿍 들어있어서 기뻐요♡ 곧 울냥이 생일도 다가 오는데 선물 듬뿍 해주고 싶네용^^
reviews.content_en: Wow! 😭 As soon as it arrived, my pup came running at the sound of the treat wrapper opening, went crazy for the smell, and started chomping it down so fast—seriously shocked me!! My picky eater who usually has no appetite is eating it SO well ♡ I used to only give the cheap treats, so I ordered this to switch to healthier options and I'm super satisfied 😭 The ingredient list shows salmon and chicken right at the top so I feel reassured, and it's HAT-certified so I feel even better, plus it's packed with only good stuff ♡ My kitty's birthday is coming up soon and I want to get them lots of treats ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 츄르처럼 환장하구 먹어용
reviews.content_en: Goes absolutely crazy for it and eats it up!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송 빠르고 파손없이 잘 도착했어요.
유통기한도 내년 9월까지라서 아주 넉넉합니다.
한포씩 사료위에 토핑하기 좋은 양이에요.
25kg되는 멍뭉이라서 하루 한포가 적을까 싶긴하지만
처음 먹여보는거라서 한포씩 시작해보려 합니다.
뜯는것도 쉽고 쭉 짜면 되는거라 편하네요!
처음 사보는건 안먹을까봐 걱정이되는데 무엇보다 멍뭉이가 잘먹어서 다행이에요.
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and arrived in perfect condition. The expiration date is September of next year, which is plenty of time. The portion size is perfect for topping over food one packet at a time. Since my pup weighs 25kg, I'm a little worried one packet might not be enough, but since it's their first time I'm planning to start with one at a time. It's easy to open and you just squeeze it out, so it's convenient! I was worried they might not eat something new, but thankfully my pup ate it so well.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
⠀요즘 저희집 댕댕이가 자동급식기 사용 이후로 사료가 나와도 제때 먹지 않았었는데 바잇미부스틱을 섞어주니 너무너무 맛있게 잘 먹더라구요!
강아지 뿐만 아니라 가끔 우리집에 놀러오는 길냥이들도 너무 좋아했어요!
영양과 기호성 모두 갖춘 제품 같아요 추천ㅂ
합니다👍🏼
⠀
#바잇미 #부스틱 #강아지츄르 #고양이츄르 #강아지간식 #고양이간식
reviews.content_en:
⠀Lately, my pup wasn't eating their meals on time even with an automatic feeder, but when I mixed in BITE ME BOOSTICK they ate SO deliciously well! Not just my dog—the stray cats that sometimes visit our house loved it too! This product has both nutrition and palatability. Highly recommend 👍🏼
⠀
#BITE ME #BOOSTICK #DogTreats #CatTreats #DogSnacks #CatSnacks

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
매일 똑같은 종류만 주면 질릴거 같아서 구매했는데 다행히 아이가 꺼리낌없이 잘 먹네요
하루에 한팩씩 간식으로 주면 너무 좋을거 같아요
reviews.content_en: I bought this thinking my pup might get bored eating the same thing every day, and thankfully they ate it without any hesitation. I think giving one packet a day as a treat would be perfect.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 챠오츄르도 안먹는 까탈냥이가 유일하게 먹는 간식이에요ㅎㅎㅎ 계속 재구매 예정입니다! ^-^♡
reviews.content_en: My picky cat won't eat CIAO treats, but this is the only snack they actually eat haha! Definitely planning to repurchase! ^-^♡

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 이제품은 말할 필요가 없어요 그냥 사세요 기호성 넘버원..진짜 고양이로 치면 츄르급제품이에요 꼭 사세요 사료에 뿌려주면 입짧아 사료 안먹는 강아지도 사료까지 진짜 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: No need to say anything about this product—just buy it. Palate appeal number one.. It's seriously the treat equivalent of a Churu for cats. Definitely get it. Even picky dogs that won't eat regular food will actually eat their food well when you sprinkle this on it.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
중성화 수술 하고 티비에서 광고하는 유명한 통조림들도 안먹어서 걱정했을때 친구가 샘플로 준 바잇미 부스틱을 사료 위에 뿌려줬는데 너무 잘 먹어서 그 이후부터 부스틱을 매 번 구매하고 있어요!

오리맛만 항상 줬었는데 너무 잘 먹어서 여러가지 맛 구매했습니다
요즘 밥도 먹다가 남기고 먹다가 남기고 하는게 부스틱만 밥 위에 올려주면 편식 없이 아주 잘 먹어요

강아지 꼬질꼬질 하지만 잘 먹는 후기 남겨요!!
reviews.content_en:
After neutering surgery, my pup wouldn't eat any of the famous canned foods advertised on TV and I was worried, but a friend gave me a BITE ME BOOSTICK sample and when I sprinkled it on the food my pup ate so well that I've been buying BOOSTICK every time since!

I used to only give the duck flavor and they ate it so well that I bought several different flavors. Lately they've been leaving food and eating partially, but as soon as I put BOOSTICK on the food they eat everything without being picky.

My pup's kind of messy but eats really well—leaving this review!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
맛과 영양까지 사로 잡은 간식이라 마음에 들어서 구매했어요.
오자마자 하나 뜯어서 저희 코코에게 줬는데 너무 잘 먹더라구요!
앞으로 부스틱만 구매해서 먹일 것 같아요. ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's a treat that captures both taste and nutrition. As soon as it arrived I opened one and gave it to our Coco and they ate it SO well! From now on I think I'll only be buying BOOSTICK. hehe

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
매일 14가지 영양소를 간편하게 부스트업!
이 문구가 딱이에요! 
영양제 하나하나 따로 먹이기 힘들 때 간편하게 먹일 수 있고 
애들도 잘 먹고 좋아하니 완전 굿 bb
reviews.content_en: Boost 14 essential nutrients conveniently every day! That tagline is perfect! When it's hard to give separate supplements one by one, you can feed it conveniently and the kids love it and eat it well so it's totally great bb

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 오리스틱.. 특식에 딱 사료랑 섞어주기도 양도 좋구 ㅜㅜ 오리 그림도 귀여워서 신뢰가 가구요(?) 간편하고 영양가 잇고 어디 나갈 때면 하나씩 또 챙기구 아주 그냥 딱입니다
reviews.content_en: Duck STICK.. perfect for special meals, the portion mixed with food is great and ㅜㅜ even the cute duck picture makes me trust it(?) It's convenient, nutritious, and whenever we go out I always pack one—it's just perfect

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
처음 먹는 간식은 어느정도 탐색을 하다가 먹는데
요거는 뜯자마자 냄새맡고 바로 와서 먼저 막 먹으려고하더니
너무 잘먹어요!
영양소가 여러가지로 많다하니 매일 한개씩 열심히 줘야겠어요~
reviews.content_en: Usually my pup explores new treats a bit before eating, but this one—as soon as I opened it they smelled it and came right away wanting to eat it. They eat it SO well! Since it has lots of different nutrients I should definitely give them one every day~

reviews.name: 몽****
reviews.content:
저번에 샀을때  너무 잘먹어서   재구매했어요~~~~
입맛  까다로운  아이인데  넘 맛있게   잘먹어요~~~성분도 믿을수있고   안심하고 먹일수  있어서  좋아요~~
reviews.content_en: I bought it last time and they ate it so well so I repurchased it~~~~ Even though my pup is picky about food they eat it SO deliciously~~~ The ingredients are trustworthy and I feel reassured feeding it so that's great~~

reviews.name: 몽****
reviews.content: 너무 잘먹어서     자주 구매하는 간식이여요~~  몸에도  좋고 알러지도 없는 간식이라   좋아요~~
reviews.content_en: They eat it SO well that it's a snack I buy frequently~~ It's good for their body and has no allergies so I love it~~

reviews.content_en: Since each one is individually packaged it's SO convenient to carry as a treat when going out

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
애들이  너무 잘 먹어요~~~
그런데 손에 짜줘야만 먹어서 짜는 기구도 같이 옵션으로 팔면 더 좋을것같아요~~~
reviews.content_en: The kids eat it SO well~~~ But they only eat it when I squeeze it out for them, so I think it would be even better if you sold a squeezing tool as an option~~~

오리맛을  엄청 잘먹어서   또 주문했어요~~
맛있는지  잘먹어요~~
reviews.content_en: They ate the duck flavor SO well that I ordered again~~ They eat it well because it's tasty~~

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 평소에 물을 너무 안먹어서 물에 타주기도 하고 영양제도 먹일겸해서 구매했는데 왠걸 너무 잘먹어요 ㅎㅎ 부스틱 간식은 잘 맞는지 묽은똥 싸거나 그런것도 없어서 지난번에 구매하고 또 구매했습니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup usually doesn't drink much water so I got this to mix in water and to give them nutrients, and wow they eat it SO well hehe. With BOOSTICK treats there are no loose stools or anything like that, so I bought it once and bought it again hehe

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
갱아지들이 냄냠 혀로 맛있게 먹는걸 보고 구매.
우리갱쥐는 찹찾은 아직 못해서 그릇에 결국 쫘줌. 넘 맛나게 먹고 더달라고 그릇을 설거지해서  다먹으면 다음에 또 구매할 것임 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it after watching the pups eat it yum-yum deliciously with their tongues. Our pup hasn't mastered licking yet so I put it in a bowl. They eat it SO tasty and ask for more—after finishing they even clean their bowl, so next time I'll definitely buy it again keke

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
1일 1포씩 주고있는데 너무 맛있게 잘 먹어서
꾸준하게 구매중이에요~~
reviews.content_en: I give one packet a day and they eat it SO deliciously well that I keep buying it consistently~~

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
사료나 간식에 뿌려주지않고
단독으로 짜줘도
너무 맛있게 잘 먹어요~~
reviews.content_en: Even without sprinkling it on food or treats and squeezing it out on its own they eat it SO deliciously well~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 운좋게 이벤트에 당첨되서 먹여봤는데 너무 잘 먹더라구요 다른 츄르종류 몇가지 먹여봤는데 잘안먹어서 대부분 버리거나 나눔 했었는데 바잇미 부스틱은  순식간에 먹길래 구매했어요~ 전 부스틱 전부 짜서 유산균이랑 섞어서 급여하고있는데 급여하고나서 그릇을보면 너무 깨끗해서 설겆이가 필요없더라구요~ 영양성분도 좋아서 믿음이 가요! 다먹우면 재구매 할 생각입니다!
reviews.content_en: I was lucky enough to win an event and tried it and my pup ate it SO well! I tried a few other types of treats but they didn't eat those well so I mostly threw them away or gave them away, but BITE ME BOOSTICK disappeared in an instant so I bought it! I squeeze out all the BOOSTICK flavors and mix with probiotics to feed, and after feeding when I look at the bowl it's SO clean I don't even need to wash it~ The nutritional content is good so I feel confident! I plan to repurchase once we finish eating!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무잘먹는 토리양
먹으면서 눈감기까지ㅎㅎ
부스틱 체험이벤트당첨으로
맛보게된 토리
너무너무 좋아하네요ㅎㅎㅎ

세가지맛
닭, 연어&닭, 오리 맛 다 잘먹어요
3.5kg인 토리는 하루에 한개
급여하고있어요
토리는 산책후에 먹이기도하고
밥잘안먹는토리라 밥잘먹은후에 먹기도한답니다
.
reviews.content_en:
Tori eats it SO well even closing their eyes while eating hehe Got to try BOOSTICK through an event giveaway Tori loves it SO much hehehe

All three flavors—chicken, salmon & chicken, and duck—they eat SO well
Tori is 3.5kg so I give one per day
Sometimes I feed it after walks and sometimes after meals since Tori doesn't always eat well
.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
성분,기호성,가성비까지 최고예요
너무 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: Best in ingredients, palatability, and value for money. They eat it SO well

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content:
미국에 사는 큰 딸이
검은 냥이 두마리 키우고있는데
여기 추르와 다른 브랜드 추르를
섞어서 보내줬는데
이것만 먹는다네요
또 주문해야겠어요^^
reviews.content_en: My older daughter living in America has two black cats and she mixed this treat with other brand treats and sent them over, but the cats only eat this one! I need to order more ^^

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 다른 맛도 구매할 걸 그랬네요. 요즘 귀청소를 소홀히 했던 탓인지 강아지가 귓병이 걸렸어요. 몇년 동안 같이 지내며 처방 받은 가루약이 생기면 시중의 강아지 간식들, 요거트, 쨈, 꿀 등에 섞어서 먹이기도 하고 그 때마다 항상 알아채서 결국은 억지로 먹이면서 지냈었는데요. 전에 바잇미에서 항상 이 제품을 되게 자주 홍보 했던 게 기억이 나서..(당시에는 별 생각 없이 지나쳤는데 무의식에 스며든  광고의 힘이 이런 건가봐요...) 일단 사서 안 먹으면 그냥 친구들 주자 하는 생각으로 구매했습니다. 아까 아침에 떨리는 맘으로 냄새도 벌써 쓴 가루약이랑 같이 섞어서 급여를 했는데, 이 까다로운 녀석이 세상에 너무 잘 먹는 거에요... 당황스러웠습니다. 몇 년 중 처음으로 억지로 입을 벌려서 약을 먹이고 씨름하지 않아도 되고 강아지도 즐겁게 먹으니 좋고, 영양도 충분하고...!!! 이럴 줄 알았으면 워낙 쉽게 질려하는 녀석이니까 다른 맛들도 사볼껄..! 하는 생각이 정말로 들었어요. 스틱 윗부분 잘라서 포장 비닐 자체에 가루약 넣으시고 스틱 안에서 섞으면 약 냄새도 묻혀버리고 더 깔끔하게 급여 가능하다는 팁 공유하고 싶네요. 너무 만족스러워요. 말투가 굉장히 광고 스럽지만 아니에요 진심을 담은 후기입니다..! 사진은 약이랑 섞였던 부스틱을 깔끔하게 핥아 먹은 밥그릇 사진이에요. P.s. 2+1 같은 행사를 같은 맛 말고 다른 맛도 교차 구매 가능하도록 해주시는 건 어떨까 생각이 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: Should have bought other flavors too. Lately I was neglecting my pup's ear cleaning and they got an ear infection. Over the years whenever I'd get prescription powder medicine, I'd mix it with store-bought dog treats, yogurt, jam, honey, etc., but my pup would always notice and eventually I'd have to force feed it. I remembered BITE ME was always promoting this product a lot (at the time I didn't think much of it but I guess that's the subconscious power of advertising...) so I just bought it thinking if they don't eat it I'll just give it to friends. This morning with trembling hands I mixed it with the bitter-smelling powder medicine and gave it—and this picky pup ate it SO well... I was shocked. For the first time in years I didn't have to forcefully pry open their mouth and struggle to give medicine, my pup ate it happily, and it's nutritious...!!! If I'd known I would've bought other flavors too since this pup gets bored so easily..! I want to share a tip—cut the top of the stick, put the powder medicine directly in the packaging pouch itself, and mix it inside the stick so the medicine smell gets masked and you can feed it more neatly. I'm SO satisfied. My tone might sound very ad-like but it's not—this is a sincere review..! The photo is a picture of the food bowl after my pup cleanly licked up the BOOSTICK that was mixed with medicine. P.S. I think it would be great if promotions like 2+1 allowed cross-purchasing different flavors instead of just the same flavor.

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 다른 맛도 구매할 걸 그랬네요. 요즘 귀청소를 소홀히 했던 탓인지 강아지가 귓병이 걸렸어요. 몇년 동안 같이 지내며 처방 받은 가루약이 생기면 시중의 강아지 간식들, 요거트, 쨈, 꿀 등에 섞어서 먹이기도 하고 그 때마다 항상 알아채서 결국은 억지로 먹이면서 지냈었는데요. 전에 바잇미에서 항상 이 제품을 되게 자주 홍보 했던 게 기억이 나서..(당시에는 별 생각 없이 지나쳤는데 무의식에 스며든  광고의 힘이 이런 건가봐요...) 일단 사서 안 먹으면 그냥 친구들 주자 하는 생각으로 구매했습니다. 아까 아침에 떨리는 맘으로 냄새도 벌써 쓴 가루약이랑 같이 섞어서 급여를 했는데, 이 까다로운 녀석이 세상에 너무 잘 먹는 거에요... 당황스러웠습니다. 몇 년 중 처음으로 억지로 입을 벌려서 약을 먹이고 씨름하지 않아도 되고 강아지도 즐겁게 먹으니 좋고, 영양도 충분하고...!!! 이럴 줄 알았으면 워낙 쉽게 질려하는 녀석이니까 다른 맛들도 사볼껄..! 하는 생각이 정말로 들었어요. 스틱 윗부분 잘라서 포장 비닐 자체에 가루약 넣으시고 스틱 안에서 섞으면 약 냄새도 묻혀버리고 더 깔끔하게 급여 가능하다는 팁 공유하고 싶네요. 너무 만족스러워요. 말투가 굉장히 광고 스럽지만 아니에요 진심을 담은 후기입니다..! 사진은 약이랑 섞였던 부스틱을 깔끔하게 핥아 먹은 밥그릇 사진이에요. P.s. 2+1 같은 행사를 같은 맛 말고 다른 맛도 교차 구매 가능하도록 해주시는 건 어떨까 생각이 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: Should have bought other flavors too. Lately I was neglecting my pup's ear cleaning and they got an ear infection. Over the years whenever I'd get prescription powder medicine, I'd mix it with store-bought dog treats, yogurt, jam, honey, etc., but my pup would always notice and eventually I'd have to force feed it. I remembered BITE ME was always promoting this product a lot (at the time I didn't think much of it but I guess that's the subconscious power of advertising...) so I just bought it thinking if they don't eat it I'll just give it to friends. This morning with trembling hands I mixed it with the bitter-smelling powder medicine and gave it—and this picky pup ate it SO well... I was shocked. For the first time in years I didn't have to forcefully pry open their mouth and struggle to give medicine, my pup ate it happily, and it's nutritious...!!! If I'd known I would've bought other flavors too since this pup gets bored so easily..! I want to share a tip—cut the top of the stick, put the powder medicine directly in the packaging pouch itself, and mix it inside the stick so the medicine smell gets masked and you can feed it more neatly. I'm SO satisfied. My tone might sound very ad-like but it's not—this is a sincere review..! The photo is a picture of the food bowl after my pup cleanly licked up the BOOSTICK that was mixed with medicine. P.S. I think it would be great if promotions like 2+1 allowed cross-purchasing different flavors instead of just the same flavor.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 오리 연어 닭~다 골고루 먹이고 있어요~이동시 가지고 다니기도 너무 편하게 소포장 되어 있어좋움
reviews.content_en: I'm feeding duck, salmon, and chicken all evenly~ It's small-packaged so it's SO convenient to carry around when going out

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 냥이도 잘먹고 건강한 간식인 것 같아서 좋아요ㅎㅎ 좋은 가격에 구매했습니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat eats it well and it seems like a healthy treat so I like it hehe Got it at a good price hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 할인 할때 매번  구매해서 쟁여 두고 있어요~ 얇고 아무데나 쏙쏙 넣어 가지고 다니기 너무 좋음
reviews.content_en: I buy it every time there's a sale and stock up~ It's thin and SO easy to slip into a bag and carry around anywhere

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
소중한 나의 작은 고양이가 심장병 진단을 받았습니다.
폐수종으로 헐떡 거리는 호흡에 놀라 들쳐안고 병원으로 달려가 입원 시키고 온 날 무지했던 집사는 울기만 했네요.
다행이도 폐가 깨끗해 졌고 퇴원을 했지만 아시다시피 hcm은 시한부 인생이라 투약을 꾸준히 해야합니다.
부스틱에 약을 섞어 주거나 캡슐로 먹이고 부스틱을 주니 잘 먹습니다.
확실히 간식용 츄르와는 묽기도 다르고(더 건조함) 영양성분도 있어 츄르대신 바잇미 부스틱으로 바꾸렵니다.
나보다 먼저가는 내새끼,,가슴 아프지만 최선을 다해주려구요.
모든 냥이와 집사님들 평안 하시길,,,
reviews.content_en: My precious little cat was diagnosed with heart disease. When I noticed her struggling to breathe with pulmonary edema, I panicked, scooped her up, and rushed her to the hospital. I admitted her and just cried like a clueless cat parent. Thankfully her lungs cleared up and she was discharged, but as you know, HCM is a limited-time illness, so she needs to take medication consistently. When I mix the medication with BITE ME Boost Stick or give it to her in capsule form and then offer the stick, she eats it well. It's definitely different in consistency from regular treat churu (much drier), and it has nutritional value, so I'm planning to switch from churu to BITE ME Boost Stick. My baby leaving before me... it breaks my heart, but I'll do my very best. Wishing peace to all kitties and their parents...

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 국산에다가 성분도 괜찮아서 구매해봤어요! 다행히 잘 먹네요 다목으면 재주문할게요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's domestically made with good ingredients! Fortunately, she's eating it well. If she keeps liking it, I'll reorder.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저는 간식으로 주고있어요
아주 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: I give it as a treat. She eats it really well.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 워낙 좋아하는 짜먹는 간식이라 좋은가격에 잘구매했습니다 아주 잘먹습니다
reviews.content_en: She really loves the squeezable treats, so I'm happy to buy it at a good price. She eats it very well.

reviews.name: 몽****
reviews.content:
아이가 엄청 잘먹어요~~~
성분도 안심하고 먹일수있어서    좋아요~~
reviews.content_en: My baby eats it so much!!! I feel reassured about the ingredients too, so that's great~~

reviews.name: 공****
reviews.content:
사료만 주면 안먹을때가 있어서 사료 위에 뿌려주고 섞어서 급여했어요 ㅎㅎ 깨끗하게 비우는거 보고 감탄했습니다 💕 
주기적으로 사야겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Sometimes she won't eat just regular food, so I sprinkle it on top and mix it in hehe. I was amazed watching her lick the bowl completely clean 💕 I'll need to buy this regularly hehe

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 세일할때 마다 재구매중입니다. 유통긱간도 넉넉해요
reviews.content_en: I keep reordering every time there's a sale. The expiration date is also generous.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 부스틱은 이것만 먹여요! 너무너무 좋아합니다!
reviews.content_en: I only feed my cat this brand of stick! I love it so much!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 고양이가 너무 좋아해요~~
reviews.content_en: My cat really loves it~~

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 다른제품 살때 사은품으로 주신거 먹일까 말까 고민하다가 중성화하고 약 먹이기 힘들때 잘 먹길래 유용하게 먹였어요 병원에서 약먹이는용 츄르는 잘 안 먹더라구요 어제 주문했는데 오늘 오전에 받았어요 앞으로 약이 몇일 남아서 잘 먹여볼게요 아이가 엄청 잘 먹어서 조금씩 주려구요
reviews.content_en: I got a sample with another product purchase and was unsure about using it, but when she was spayed and had trouble taking medicine, she ate it well so I found it useful. The churu from the vet wasn't working well. I ordered yesterday and received it this morning. I have a few more days of medicine left, so I'll make sure she eats it well. Since my baby eats it so much, I'm planning to give it in small amounts.

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
제품 구매시 샘플 넣어주셔서 한 두번 먹여보다가 요번에 맛별로 먹여보았어요.
영양분을 한포에 담아 츄르식으로 먹일수 있어 너무 간편하고, 영양제라고해서 기호성이 떨어지면 어떻게하나 걱정했는데 간식처럼 또 달라고 난리에요🥰 아이가 잘먹으니 추가구매 의향 100% 있습니다!
reviews.content_en: When I purchased the product, they included a sample, so I tried it once or twice. This time I tried different flavors. Being able to put nutrition in one stick and feed it like churu is so convenient! I was worried the palatability might suffer since it's a nutritional supplement, but she keeps asking for more like it's a regular treat 🥰 Since my baby eats it well, I'm 100% willing to make additional purchases!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
어쩌다보니 밥그릇도 유산균도 바밍아웃을 해버렸지만
바잇미 부스틱은 회사 언니가 몇개줘서 처음 접해봤지만
밥에 뿌려도 잘 먹고 그냥 먹어도 잘 먹고
바잇미 유산균이랑 섞어줘도 잘 먹어서 자주 시켜요
reviews.content_en: Somehow I ended up running out of the food bowl and probiotics from another brand, but my coworker gave me a few BITE ME Boost Sticks to try for the first time. Whether I sprinkle it on rice or give it plain, she eats it well, and she eats it well mixed with BITE ME probiotics too, so I order it frequently.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
영양소가 듬뿍 들어있어서 믿고 구매합니다
기호성이 완전 좋지는 않은지.. 집에서 줄때는 가끔 안먹을때도 있어요🥲
그래도 산책 하고 잠시 앉아서 쉴때 주는 편인데 그땐 잘 먹네요ㅎㅎ 먹고나면 입 주변이 좀 지저분해지지만 귀여우니 괜찮습니다☺️🩷
reviews.content_en: I buy it with confidence because it's packed with nutrients. The palatability isn't perfect though... sometimes she won't eat it when I give it at home 🥲 But I usually give it when we're on a walk and she takes a break to rest, and she eats well then hehe. Her mouth gets a bit messy after eating, but it's cute so it's fine ☺️🩷

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content:
바잇미라 믿고 결제했어요.
오리구매했는데 기호성 미치고 쪼금씩 산책할때 짜서 주면서 집중 연습하는데 효과 짱짱입니다 생각보다 한개 스틱으로 오래 먹어서 8개입이지만 꽤 오래 먹일 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: I trusted the BITE ME brand and checked out. I got the duck flavor and her taste preference is incredible. When I squeeze a little bit during walks for focused training, the results are amazing! One stick lasts longer than I expected, so even though it's 8 sticks, I think it will last quite a while!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
관절약한 울 막내에게 먹기 싫어하는 영양제 먹일때 필요해서 구매했어요. 
사실은 지난번  바잇미에서  보내준 샘플을 영양제에 섞여서 먹였는데 너무 잘먹고 좋아해서 재구매했습니다.
reviews.content_en: My youngest has weak joints, so I bought this to help her take the nutritional supplements she dislikes. Actually, last time I mixed the sample BITE ME sent with her supplements and she ate it so well and loved it, so I repurchased.

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
더운날들에 리킹매트에 짜서 얼려서 산책후 주려고 해요
영양츄르라 더 좋아요😀
reviews.content_en: On hot days, I'm planning to squeeze it onto a licking mat, freeze it, and give it to her after walks. It's even better because it's a nutritional churu 😀

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 먹는 모습만 봐도 배부르다는 어른들 말씀이 하나 틀린게 없네요 정신없이 얼굴한번 들지않고 입한번 떼지않고 열정적으로 먹는 모습만 봐도 행복한 웃음이 끊이질않네요
reviews.content_en: The saying that adults feel full just watching someone eat—there's not a word of truth to it. Just watching him eat so enthusiastically, never lifting his face, never pausing, brings endless happy smiles.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지 좋아하는것만 섞어서 만든 스틱이라 역시 기호도가 엄청나네요ㅎㅎ 사료에 뿌려줬는데 밥그릇 깊숙히 코 박고 맛있게 먹어요 
재구매 의사 있습니다!!
reviews.content_en: Since this stick is made by mixing only the things our dog loves, the palatability is amazing hehe When I sprinkled it on his food, he buried his nose deep in the bowl and ate it deliciously. I'm willing to repurchase!!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 일단 저희 강아지가 너무너무 좋아해요 스틱으로 되어있어서 어디서나 들고다니기도 좋고 잘 먹어서 더 좋아요!! 특히 저희 강아지는 영양제를 먹을때 잘 안먹으려해서 힘든데 짜주면 귀신같이 잘 먹는답니다 영양 보조간식으로 꾸준히 먹여볼 예정입니다!!
reviews.content_en: First of all, my dog loves it so much! Since it comes as a stick, it's easy to carry around anywhere, and it tastes great too!! Especially for my dog who doesn't like to eat supplements—when I squeeze this, he eats it like magic hehe I'm planning to continuously feed it as a nutritional supplementary treat!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
다행히 잘먹어요! 용량도 많고 좋네요.
츄르보다 포장지가 살짝 두꺼운거 같은데 그래서 그런가
한손으로 짜다보면 구석에 꽤 남아있어요.
츄르 짜개 있으면 더 편할거 같긴 해요.
reviews.content_en: Fortunately he eats it well! The volume is generous too. The packaging seems slightly thicker than regular churu, maybe because of that? When I squeeze it with one hand, quite a bit remains in the corners. It would be more convenient if there was a churu squeezer.
